message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor Black
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorBackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  LifeLineBorderColor Black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor Transparent
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  NoteBorderColor #FFD700
}

title 系统用户登录时序图

actor "Client" as Client
participant "API" as API
participant "MsgServer" as MsgServer

box "login" #LightSteelBlue
end box

==

Client -> API: 1 login
activate API
API --> API: 2 account verify

alt verify success:
    API -->> Client: 3 generate jwt and return
    note left of Client: connect MsgServer with jwt
    Client -> MsgServer: 4 connect MsgServer and build tcp connect
    activate MsgServer
    MsgServer --> MsgServer: 5 parse jwt and attr the accountInfo to Channel
    MsgServer -->> Client: 6 connect success
    deactivate MsgServer
else verify fail:
    API -->> Client: 7 login failed;
end

deactivate API

@enduml
```
